name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The work I am doing for New Mexicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, and I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180819_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180819_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180819_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grids and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate earlier this month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico.** The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**And I 'm standing up to President Trump's cynical attempt to force consumers to bailout uncompetitive coal and nuclear power plants. **In a blatant effort to keep his campaign promises, the president is claiming a national security emergency to keep coal-fired plants open. But the truth is there is no national security emergency, and this artificial bailout will increase energy costs and leave businesses and households paying higher electric bills. I am going to keep fighting against this bailout and any attempt to drag us back on energy, and I will continue to push for modernizing and diversifying our energy grid.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180819_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180819_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180819_1_1")_**

subject: what wasn't said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e63c4/51dbcc2a/1f9d59f6/3a9ad3f/3863305293/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") President Trump's visit to Wilkes-Barre a couple weeks ago made one thing perfectly clear, team: he just doesn't understand Pennsylvanians. Here's what wasn't said during his rally earlier this month:
1. The GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme gave the majority of benefits to corporations and the 1%, not the people who need it most.

2. Because of the deficit that tax scheme created, the GOP has proposed devastating cuts to Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security.

3. Multiple attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act have put the health care of millions of Americans at risk and forced premiums to spike.

The President's agenda makes it clear that he is out of touch with what Pennsylvanians truly need. My opponent, Congressman Barletta, is no better: he says he's running to "work for" President Trump, rather than working for the constituents he represents. He already votes with the President 99% of the time as a member of the House, and that won't change if he's elected to the Senate.

**The Trump administration's agenda has already hurt middle-class families and workers across the Commonwealth, and we need to put a stop to it. I'm running for re-election because the people of Pennsylvania deserve better, but I can't win without support from people like you. Can you make a $5 donation to my campaign today?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180819_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oFGpkFQKBo9FiXlu9IbcpVIvu9fMx38i2VBC2Jg7bj8=/nsxTNV_QcAt3cJyFv4SiVZK8kpYc8TSfkDldfkCAKxE=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)
Peter, I can't believe it's been over a year already.

I launched this campaign because I kept hearing the same stories of fear, frustration, and disappointment from Kansans throughout the second district about what has been happening in Washington. And honestly, I was tired of it.

The people we have entrusted to speak for us in Congress stopped listening because they were too busy spending their time playing party politics and catering to special interests. I was ready to fight D.C.'s culture of corruption then, and I still am today.

Kansans can hold Washington accountable and tackle the problems our state and our country face. But first, we need to win in November. **[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more each month, from now until Election Day, to make sure that happens?](https://act.myngp.com/el/oFGpkFQKBo9FiXlu9IbcpVIvu9fMx38i2VBC2Jg7bj8=/nsxTNV_QcAt3cJyFv4SiVZK8kpYc8TSfkDldfkCAKxE=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

Thanks,

Paul

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Davis <info@davisforkansas.com>
Date: Wed, Aug 15, 2018
Subject: One year

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oFGpkFQKBo9FiXlu9IbcpVIvu9fMx38i2VBC2Jg7bj8=/nsxTNV_QcAt3cJyFv4SiVZK8kpYc8TSfkDldfkCAKxE=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)
Friends,

One year ago today, Paul Davis announced his candidacy for the United States Congress.

The leaders we chose to send to Washington weren't representing Kansas values anymore; they were ignoring the people they represent and forgetting where they came from. So Paul decided to do something about it.

We've come so far in the last year, but it's going to take a lot of resources to beat the D.C. political machine and Steve Watkins this November. **[Will you commit to chipping in $5 or more each month until Election Day?](https://act.myngp.com/el/oFGpkFQKBo9FiXlu9IbcpVIvu9fMx38i2VBC2Jg7bj8=/nsxTNV_QcAt3cJyFv4SiVZK8kpYc8TSfkDldfkCAKxE=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

Now that the primary is over, there are special interests and dark money groups out there spending millions on negative, false attack ads to try and convince you that Paul is not the leader we need.

But that's not going to stop us: since day one, this campaign has been a grassroots effort to bring people together, not drive them apart, and we're so thankful you've been a part of it this far. **[Help us keep the momentum going and elect Paul Davis to Congress this November by pledging to make a monthly donation from now until Election Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oFGpkFQKBo9FiXlu9IbcpVIvu9fMx38i2VBC2Jg7bj8=/nsxTNV_QcAt3cJyFv4SiVZK8kpYc8TSfkDldfkCAKxE=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

Thank you,

Team Davis

[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.myngp.com/el/oFGpkFQKBo9FiXlu9IbcpVIvu9fMx38i2VBC2Jg7bj8=/nsxTNV_QcAt3cJyFv4SiVZK8kpYc8TSfkDldfkCAKxE=?gpsid=13_36_2876&refcode=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180819_oneyr2_fnd_gq_act_rec_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)

body:
A progressive for California's 6th Assembly district! | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
# Jackie Smith is RIGHT!

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Progressive for California's 6th Assembly District. I'd like to introduce you to an activist, a champion of the people and my friend, Jackie Smith.

Jackie is an advocate and part of the LGBTQ community. She established the first ever and highly needed Stonewall club of Placer County. She supports a single-payer healthcare system and will fight to revive and pass SB 562 because she believes that healthcare is a basic human right. Jackie has stood alongside me and union members fighting for worker's rights, a living wage, and acknowledges the housing crisis and income inequality that our nation is facing.

**I ****firmly believe that now is the RIGHT time for the RIGHT voice to represent us at the Capitol, and that is Jackie! I ask you to join me in helping Jackie defeat freshman assembly member, Kevin Kiley.** In his one year in office Kiley has proved time and time again to be a rubberstamp for the GOP through his voting record. Kiley's dreams aren't too better the lives of our community, but rather to rise in the political ranks as he is already looking to run for Senate with nothing to show, except for hardline stances against immigration, education, our criminal justice system and the environment.

subject: Re: saving the Affordable Care Act and Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, called the ACA a "disaster" and called for a full repeal of Medicaid - if he becomes Virginia's next Senator. -----------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | **The Affordable Care Act and Medicaid are at risk in this election.
[Sign your name if you think defending them is a top priority.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12bd/3e0906/6cabb339/3e355e13/3612496628/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-our-health-care?source=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+if+you+think+defending+th&utm_campaign=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")**
---
Derek,

Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, called the ACA a "disaster," and promised to immediately join President Trump and Republican efforts to fully repeal the Affordable Care Act if he becomes our next Senator.

On top of that, Corey's even called for a full repeal of Medicaid, which provides health care to the more than [1.3 million Virginians](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12bd/3e0906/6cabb339/3e355e12/3612496628/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-our-health-care?source=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-++if+consAddressstatename++Virginia+13+mi&utm_campaign=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid") who struggle to afford coverage.

**Show Corey Stewart that Virginians don 't support his efforts to gut Medicaid and repeal the Affordable Care Act: [Sign our petition >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12bd/3e0906/6cabb339/3e355e11/3612496628/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-our-health-care?source=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Sign+our+petitionnbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")**
[**PROTECT OUR HEALTH CARE:
SIGN THE PETITION**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12bd/3e0906/6cabb339/3e355e10/3612496628/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-our-health-care?source=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+PROTECT+OUR+HEALTH+CARE%0A%09%09%09%09%09SIGN+THE+PE&utm_campaign=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")
---
The 2018 midterms will determine whether we'll have the power to create progress and work towards health care for all - or if millions of Americans will be put at risk of their health care being taken away.

Remember: When Republicans in Congress tried to repeal Obamacare, the only thing that saved access to health care for the 24 million Americans who rely on the ACA was _one vote_ at the very last second. That means if Democrats don't take back the Senate in November, the Affordable Care Act could be repealed within months.

**Tim believes Corey is flat out _wrong_ , and Tim is fighting to expand access to health care for all.** He stood up to Republican efforts to repeal the ACA, and he's got a plan to give all Americans access to a quality, affordable health care plan through "Medicare-X."

Stand with Tim and tell Corey Stewart that we won't support his efforts to undo all the progress we've made toward providing health care for every American: [Add your name today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12bd/3e0906/6cabb339/3e355e17/3612496628/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/protect-our-health-care?source=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+name+todaynbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180819_1_PET_TEAM_Medicaid")

Thanks,

Research Team
Tim Kaine for Virginia

What are Republicans hiding?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a1ad/c1f7015/6a6f1bb2/1141a02d/2851470189/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_kavanaugh-documents?source=rtw_20180819_em-B&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") Join me and tell Senate Republicans that we must review all of Brett Kavanaugh's documents before they hold any confirmation hearings. **Add your name now:** **[Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a1ad/c1f7015/6a6f1bb2/1141a02d/2851470189/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_kavanaugh-documents?source=rtw_20180819_em-B&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** Friends, Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court, Brett Kavanaugh, could be the deciding vote on overturning _Roe vs. Wade_ , attacks on health care reform, and cases that could change the course of this country for generations. **We cannot allow Republicans to rush his hearings and force his confirmation through without the Senate -- and the public -- seeing his full record.** Mitch McConnell has set hearings for September 4 so we don't have time to waste. They have to hear from you now. **[Will you join me and demand Senate Republicans stop any hearings until we have Brett Kavanaugh's full record? The only way to stop them is for a giant public outcry now:](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a1ad/c1f7015/6a6f1bb2/1141a02d/2851470189/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_kavanaugh-documents?source=rtw_20180819_em-B&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** **[Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a1ad/c1f7015/6a6f1bb2/1141a02d/2851470189/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_kavanaugh-documents?source=rtw_20180819_em-B&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** Democratic nominees like Sonia Sotomayor and Elena Kagan have released the same documents Brett Kavanaugh is being asked to release now. Justice Sotomayor was even forced to release minutes from board meetings DECADES ago. This is not an abnormal request. Republicans are clearly trying to hide what is in these documents. And before anyone is given a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the country, we must have answers. **[Sign my petition and demand Republicans stop any confirmation hearings without a full release of Brett Kavanaugh's records.
